title: Squirrel Removal in Sleepy Hollow, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Sleepy Hollow, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic restoration. Serving historic homes & estates. Call for fast service!
intro: Sleepy Hollow's historic homes and tree-lined streets provide the perfect habitat for squirrels, but these persistent rodents can cause serious damage to attics, soffits, and electrical wiring. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Sleepy Hollow, from the Historic District to Philipsburg Manor. Our experienced technicians provide humane trapping, complete exclusion work, and damage repair to protect your Westchester property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Sleepy Hollow and Westchester County for years, with deep knowledge of the unique pest challenges facing this historic village's period homes and newer constructions alike. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods and provide guaranteed exclusion services to ensure squirrels don't return to your property.
localContext: Sleepy Hollow's mature oak and maple trees, combined with historic architecture and proximity to the Hudson River, create ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive. From Victorian homes in the Historic District to properties near Sleepy Hollow Cemetery and Kingsland Point Park, we've helped countless residents protect their attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces from squirrel intrusion.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Sleepy Hollow?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Sleepy Hollow typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion work, and sanitation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Sleepy Hollow homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Sleepy Hollow due to the abundant tree coverage and older home construction with accessible entry points. Gray squirrels frequently enter attics through roof vents, soffits, and gaps in trim, especially during fall and spring nesting seasons. Historic homes often have multiple vulnerable areas that require professional sealing.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Sleepy Hollow property?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Sleepy Hollow service calls within 24 hours and can begin trapping immediately. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels present. After removal, we perform exclusion work the same week to prevent re-entry and can schedule attic restoration as needed.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees on squirrel exclusion work in Sleepy Hollow?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all exclusion work performed in Sleepy Hollow. Our technicians seal all potential entry points using durable materials designed to withstand determined squirrels. If squirrels re-enter through our sealed areas within the warranty period, we return at no additional charge to resolve the issue.
